name: Commercial Hero Front View
commercial_use: Homepage hero, campaign launch, paid social creative
visual_goal: Show the full outfit clearly while creating a confident brand-first image.
composition: Full-body front-facing composition, model centered, clean negative space around the silhouette.
model_direction: Stand tall with relaxed shoulders, one subtle weight shift, direct but calm expression.
styling_notes: Garment should be fully visible, steamed, properly fitted, and free of distracting accessories.
lighting: Large soft key light from the front-left, gentle fill, controlled shadow under the feet.
camera_language: 50mm lens look, eye-level camera, crisp focus, natural proportions.
prompt: Professional commercial fashion photography of a model wearing the featured outfit, full-body front view, centered composition, clean studio background, soft premium lighting, confident calm expression, sharp garment detail, polished campaign image.
negative_prompt: distorted body, extra limbs, messy fabric, harsh shadows, overexposed skin, low-resolution, cluttered background, cartoon style
